title: FlickView
description: Snap the view to 360°, 180°, 90° or any custom angle. Smooth controls and a stylish UI deliver precise perspective shifts instantly
body:
![FlickView](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fda0ab6cd121c769001cd37836e03fb8e9752dcd_0.webp)

# FlickView: Adjust your view with precision

FlickView is a client-side camera utility mod for Minecraft that lets you rotate your view instantly or smoothly with simple keybinds. It is designed for quick direction changes, cleaner camera control, and a lightweight in-game settings menu.

Version **3.0.0** improves smoothness, UI clarity, and general compatibility, while adding safer behavior for server use.

## ✨ Features
- **Yaw Rotation**: rotate your view by 180°, 90°, or any custom angle
- **Pitch Rotation**: press once to move to a preset pitch, press again to return
- **Smooth Rotation**: enable easing for more natural camera movement
- **360 Spin**: toggle continuous spin on or off
- **Spin Direction**: choose left or right rotation
- **Rotation Speed**: adjust spin and rotation speed to your preference
- **Character Spin**: rotate the player model while keeping the camera behavior configurable
- **Auto Sneak Spin**: optional timed sneak pulses during spin
- **Spin Counter**: display a live 360 spin counter on screen
- **Counter Position**: choose where the counter appears
- **Server Safety**: disables 360 Spin automatically on multiplayer servers by default
- **Clean Settings UI**: simple in-game controls with a compact layout
- **Client-side only**: no server installation required

## 🆕 What's New in 3.0.0
- Improved spin smoothness
- Improved compatibility with other mods
- Added **Server Safety**
- Added **Character Spin**
- Added more **Spin Counter** position options
- Added a **Report** menu with quick links
- Improved text clarity across the mod
- Improved overall settings layout

## 🎬 Preview
### 360 Spin
![3in1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RoFWvfbW/images/f29ae96e87abcdab168426970b23deeaefe3a6f2.gif)

### Yaw Rotation with Smooth Rotation Enabled

Check the Gallery for more previews.

## 🔧 Requirements
- **Minecraft**: supported versions are listed in each release
- **Loaders**:
  - **Fabric** *(available now)*
  - **Forge** *(planned)*
  - **Quilt** *(planned)*
  - **NeoForge** *(planned)*
- **Dependencies**:
  - **Fabric API** *(required for Fabric)*
- **Java**: 21+

## 📖 Default Controls
1. Press **O** to open the FlickView settings.
2. Press **K** to enable or disable the mod.
3. Press **U** to use **Pitch Rotation**.
4. Press **Y** to use **Yaw Rotation**.
5. Press **I** to toggle **360 Spin**.

All controls and behavior can be adjusted in the settings menu.
